name: ED Surge — Mass Casualty Incident
description: Multi-vehicle accident sends 15+ patients to LRMC ED simultaneously. Triggers rapid admissions, high SIEM event volume, HL7 ADT message burst, and network saturation on ED VLAN.

epic_events.description: Rapid sequence of ED registrations, triage assessments, STAT orders, and trauma activations

network_correlation.description: ED VLAN (25) bandwidth spikes. PACS imaging traffic surges on VLAN 60. HL7 ADT message burst on VLAN 30.

events.description: PACS traffic surge — portable chest X-rays from ED
Citrix ADC connection count spikes — many clinicians logging in

flow_anomalies.description: ED workstations → Epic app tier 3x normal

indicators: Citrix session count spike coincides with Epic login burst
HL7 ADT A01 (admit) messages 5x normal rate
